con:interface.name: NOTAM Management System API (NMS-API)
con:interface.con:description:
**Overview**
The NMS-API provides endpoints for requesting NOTAM data. Optional filters are provided to request subsets of NOTAM data. Supported filters are: accountability, classification, effect start and end date, feature, free text, id, last updated date, latitude, location, longitude, NOTAM number, and radius.
The API also supports requesting initial load data by NOTAM classification.
The API also support requesting NOTAM checklists data. Checklist data is filtered by: accountability, classification, and location.
Additionally, the API provides access to Location-Series data.
**Authentication**
Access to the API endpoints is restricted by bearer token authentication. The bearer token is renewed using the *client_id*, *client_secret*, and *authorization URL* provided during API registration. To renew the token a POST request must be sent to the *authorization URL*. --- ***Example:*** ``` curl -X POST \ --location "<HOST>" \ -d grant_type=client_credentials \ -u <CLIENT_ID>:<CLIENT_SECRET> ```
**Data Formats**
NMS-API responses are JSON formatted messages. NOTAM data within the response body will be represented as either AIXM 5.1 or GeoJSON format, depending on the user provided *nmsResponseFormat* HTTP header. The *nmsResponseFormat* header is a required parameter, if it is not provided an error will be generated. Acceptable header values are:
*nmsResponseFormat: AIXM | GEOJSON*
**Reference Documentation**
FNS NDS WSDD, FNS NDS WSRD, and AIDAP IRD

con:method.name: getLocationSeries
con:method.con:description:
Returns a set of Location-Series data based on the provided last updated date query parameter. If a last update date is not provided the request will assume a one (1) hour request window from current time in UTC. Requests boundaries should not exceed five (5) days in the past. Data is returned in JSON format.
Returns a set of Location-Series data.

con:parameter.con:name: lastUpdatedDate
con:parameter.con:description: Filters all Location-Series data by the provided last modification time criteria, generating a set of Location-Series mappings which have been modified between the provided *lastUpdatedDate* and current UTC time.

con:method.name: getFilteredNotams
con:method.con:description:
Returns a partial set of NOTAM data based on the provided query parameters. NOTAM data may be returned in either AIXM or GeoJSON formats as determined by the *nmsResponseFormat* header parameter.
Query parameters are evaluated using logical 'AND' conditions. Some parameters may require supporting parameters also be provided. Query parameter relationships are defined in the individual parameter descriptions.
If no query parameters are provided an error will be returned.
Returns a partial set of NOTAM data based on the provided query parameters.

con:parameter.con:name: nmsResponseFormat
con:parameter.con:description: The NOTAM format to be provided in the response body.

con:parameter.con:name: accountability
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided accountability criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: classification
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided classification criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: effectiveEndDate
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data based on the provided start and end time criteria. This parameter must be used together with the *effectiveStartDate* parameter.

con:parameter.con:name: effectiveStartDate
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data based on the provided start and end time criteria. This parameter must be used together with the *effectiveEndDate* parameter.

con:parameter.con:name: feature
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided feature criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: freeText
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided free text criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: nmsId
con:parameter.con:description: Filters all NOTAM data by the provided unique identifier criteria. Returns a single NOTAM, whether active or inactive.

con:parameter.con:name: lastUpdatedDate
con:parameter.con:description: Filters all NOTAM data by the provided last modification time criteria, generating a set of NOTAMs which have been modified (created, updated, canceled) between the provided *lastUpdatedDate* and current UTC time. This parameter is limited to a 72 hour window prior to current time. Returned data will include both active and inactive NOTAMs.

con:parameter.con:name: latitude
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided geospatial criteria. The latitude is provided in decimal degrees (ex. 32.897), ranging between [-90, 90]. This parameter must be used together with the *longitude* and *radius* parameters.

con:parameter.con:name: location
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided location criteria. The location may be represented in either domestic or ICAO formats.

con:parameter.con:name: longitude
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided geospatial criteria. The longitude is provided in decimal degrees (ex. -97.037), ranging between [-180, 180]. This parameter must be used together with the *latitude* and *radius* parameters.

con:parameter.con:name: notamNumber
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided NOTAM number. This parameter must be used together with the *location* parameter.

con:parameter.con:name: radius
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided geospatial criteria. The radius is presented in nautical miles ranging between [0, 100]. This parameter must be used together with the *longitude* and *latitude* parameters.

con:method.name: getNotamsChecklist
con:method.con:description:
Returns a set of NOTAM Checklist data as constrained by provided filter criteria. If no filter criteria are provided checklist details for all active NOTAMs will be returned.
Returns checklist formatted subset of NOTAM data based on the provided query parameters.

con:parameter.con:name: accountability
con:parameter.con:description: Filters NOTAM checklist by the provided accountability criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: classification
con:parameter.con:description: Filters NOTAM checklist data by the provided classification criteria.

con:parameter.con:name: location
con:parameter.con:description: Filters NOTAM checklist data by the provided location criteria. The location may be provided in either domestic or ICAO formats.

con:method.name: getInitialLoad
con:method.con:description:
Returns a signed URL representing the location of compressed initial load files containing the set of active NOTAMs across all classification types. The signed URL will expire after 5 minutes.
Returns a signed URL representing the location of compressed initial load files.

con:parameter.con:name: allowRedirect
con:parameter.con:description: Toggles whether to allow temporary redirects. If not provided then temporary redirects will be enabled by default.

con:parameter.con:name: classification
con:parameter.con:description: Filters active NOTAM data by the provided classification criteria.

con:method.name: getInitialLoadByClassification
con:method.con:description:
Returns a signed URL representing the location of compressed initial load files partitioned by the provided classification. The signed URL will expire after 5 minutes.
Returns a signed URL representing the location of compressed initial load files partitioned by the provided classification.

con:parameter.con:name: allowRedirect
con:parameter.con:description: Toggles whether to allow temporary redirects. If not provided then temporary redirects will be enabled by default.
